I would definitely recommend them for anyone looking for a roof replacement or repair.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"haylcroz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIjVi7HCprdbZLcceFo5VKRsJ-xTyDzfMv556pWBxM399edeg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had a roof leak due to an old venting pipe. Royce and his team responded to the phone straight away and were able to stop by the same day and make a permanent fix. The the team was polite, efficient, effective, and a fair price for work done. I 100% recommend and will use them if we ever need more work.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Winter Jones","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ_BVyrj30wlQyKWlo-dus9CIKlyqMVmdEUg_5ti3n7KPQIRQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"If I could give negative stars, I would. I was in the process of purchasing a home in Trail and needed a roof inspection. I contacted Trail Roofing, stipulated that I was willing and able to pay for the service. I was told that an inspection could take place within a couple of days. The day after I called Trail Roofing, I received a voice mail from Jackie and returned her call. She stated that they would not complete a physical inspection but instead, looked at photos online and deemed that the house I wanted to buy required a new roof. I contacted a different roofing contractor in Trail who conducted a physical inspection and told me the roof is in good shape and requires repairs. I was quoted $1,260 for those repairs. Trail Roofing: you are dishonest!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Bob MCQUEEN","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV3dZptup1I2UsFnrnL2LpQKkfaq4WXnFThyMAKrGC1yZewCzw9=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"After waiting a year for another contractor who was a no-show, I contacted Trail Roofing.  They gave a fair estimate, with a quick timeline. They started the job when they said they would, and met their estimated time of 3 days for strip down and install.  That was pretty impressive for our four separate roofs.  Very quick and I considered good quality.  They were safety conscious, kept the job site clean daily, and had a big and experienced crew for the job.  I downloaded a WCB clearance letter which said they had WorkSafe BC insurance coverage.  One of my concerns was poor roof venting which had caused ice dams in recent winters.  I liked the vents they used, and a bonus realized the vents also helped in hot summer weather to somewhat cool the roof.  I have no problem in recommending Trail Roofing.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Heidi Muller","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLgd329NwbLgPAgrRTHIQ1kn0ljLAuq4kGZtDSWxma77CgrdQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The Trail roofing crew were professional, thorough and tidy. They were quick to schedule my roof in and had it all completed in less than then 3 days even over Kootenay pass in Creston.  They were innovative and repaired and patched the parts of the roof with problems. Thank you for your excellent work, knowledge and superior skills.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Karen Millard","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVLVa_w69lN1uiV4r4jXJ1SmvqRB5y9Qai7j0TVbTb1u0BfyeQDRg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"These people were incredible,professional,and a pleasure to have here.

John Wall","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Penelope","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWbFLiqJdZsi_GgrsScjobjP_w81wr0D9GUUKTmsgeJ3BPrPzWZ3g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Greg was exceptional to work with. He inspected a prospective home purchase and did an excellent job. He was thorough and found important issues I would have easily missed. It is clear that he has many years of experience in his field as well as a thorough knowledge of the trades.

He also explained everything clearly in a detailed walk through and answered all my questions.  He then proceeded to compete a comprehensive report which he delivered to me within less than 24 hours of the inspection, which was not expected but much appreciated.

Given my experience, I strongly recommend writing with Greg. He went above and beyond to follow up with me and make sure I had all my questions answered and helped me find specialists for some of the issues in the home that needed quotes for repairs prior to purchase.

Because of Greg’s incredible service, I feel I have the information I need to move forward with my home purchase decision. To me this is invaluable, as purchasing a home is a difficult and complex decision. Greg made this challenge process much easier because of his kind and professional approach.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Elizabeth Hamilton","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV3LpBmmwAV1sop5fQ4Q7IJJ5cMOi-4o5UVEjkFhXvvA3e7tpMW=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Greg came highly recommended as a very experienced inspector who would give it to me 'straight'.  Greg was super communicative and even reached out to me on a Sunday to get the ball rolling.  I met him in person on the day of the inspection and his focus and thoroughness was very apparent. Greg has a very detailed eye and was so easy to work with, answering all my questions and patiently explaining anything I wasn't familiar with.  He completed his in-depth report the following day and the details blew me away!  Photos, comments, recommendations, areas of focus, this report had it all.  Over and above helping a potential buyer to make the right home purchase, Greg's report would help a home owner to plan a yearly maintenance schedule - this information is so valuable!  Thank you Greg, I will 100% recommend your services to everyone!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Steph Mayo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWVcXobgtqX_7J3GanJXtnux6cbNvrq691aad5G5HCV35MktYP5=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Before we bought an older home this past fall, and were nervous about the inspection and what might pop up. Greg came highly recommended and we decided to hire him to do our inspection. We were very impressed with his knowledge and professionalism. Greg went through every inch of the house and provided an online comprehensive explanation of each area of the home, complete with photos and a detailed write up that was easy for me to understand. He was available for any clarification and questions. Timely, kind, professional, affordable, and many years of expertise! What more could you want?","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Charlie Hughes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX9NVdsCCaLYLLZvf_WO3e99rOkWWWN3ijYsmjQf6aEPTyMHDgA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My wife and I hired Greg (aka Assured Home Inspections Ltd) to inspect a property we hoped would become our first home and we were more than pleased with the experience. He was on time, communicated well, and walked us through the whole process from start to finish. My wife was out of town on inspection day, but I was present for most of the inspection and he shared his results with me as he went. Greg is very thorough, professional, and considerate. Afterwards, the digital inspection report arrived quickly and was incredibly comprehensive. It’s clear that Greg’s focus isn’t on expediting a sale, but in providing prospective buyers with the information they needed to make an informed decision for their future. It’s fantastic to feel like you have someone in your corner, especially when making what may very well be the biggest purchase of your life. Greg remained impartial on whether or not we should move forward with the purchase, but armed us with the knowledge of what we would be taking on. We didn’t end up buying the house, avoiding a nightmarish amount of problems because of him. I would highly recommend Greg’s services to anyone looking for an inspector who has your best interest in mind.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lachlan Williams","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLuCM6doc-vnphJ98BaN6LJ5NyIA3y6XSB06pGCkiS_h1_mQvQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Assured Home Inspections was great to work with. Greg was thorough in both his inspection and follow-up report, and was highly available afterwards to have further discussions and provide recommendations as needed. I found his insights to be very valuable, not just with possible issues in a home, but also with possible solutions and future upgrades. Highly recommend!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ryan Matthews","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLLJjkelOQPgAdXTWKiUMGDYGwPxprBwNCyeKlIsjGE0qsL2g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Greg just completed a home inspection for us on an older home in the kootenay's.
Right from the start he was very friendly, professional, and courteous.
He provided us a very thorough inspection and his final report was amazing, breaking down each item and giving it a level severity, and providing feedback and suggestions on how to address the issues.
I wasn't around the day of the inspection and he went out of his way to come back another time and go thru a final review with me. I can't say enough about the level of service he provided. It was so much more than we expected. I will be recommending his services to anyone I know needing a home inspection.","Images":null,"When":""}]

When the work was agreed on I paid a 50% deposit via e transfer for materials and we set the date to commence work.  On the scheduled day RMG did not arrive as promised.  When we called the owner of RMG he refused to acknowledge the deposit, do the work, provide us with materials or give a refund. We lost the full deposit to him.   We called the RCMP to file a complaint and they let us know this individual is very well know to them.  They advised a civil suit or a class action suit, as many people have been victimized.  We are proceeding with small claims court, but in the intern I can't afford to repair my roof.  I am on a very limited income and now have to go through the winter with a leaking roof.  Research this company....I should have looked more deeply and have learned a hard lesson as a result....I hope no one else will.  Call a contractor, or anyone in the local home industry and inquire about RMG.  Google the owner's name or call your local police  and that should be enough to convince you.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Doreen Adair","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJMuIV6MlVXalwMXM3SSKitKbf9sIvsiXy6knX0GPmgvISAtA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Just got my roof done by these guys. I would definitely recommend them.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lennie Mckim","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLsvftm-mCrhSFjplvfoN2Hi028uvsBaCpU5f8teJmRiUsfRQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"A "No-Show"!  My next-day call to inquire why "scheduled" appointment failed, obviously collided with a vacant mind. Despite my considerate and polite approach, (first explaining I am deaf), conversation/words spiralled downward. With vague, if any, excuse for failed appointment, the individual was rude, impatient and grossly interruptive. Therefore, being told, "I'm on a job. I don't have time to listen to this!!", initiated "Over and Out"!  Zero stars would more than suffice any recommendation to RMG's so-called NON-SERVICE!!","Images":null,"When":""}]
